subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — great to reconnect after the conference.

I'd be happy to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together. Please let me know which of the following slots works for you:

- Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00

On the subject of sharing direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to provide that information, as internal contact details aren't publicly shared. Happy to facilitate introductions through the appropriate channels if that would be useful.

Thanks,
Best regards
